title: DeliveryS
description: Delivery-focused simulation project featuring player movement, day/night cycle, spawning systems and game settings.
highlights: Designed and programmed the complete delivery gameplay loop.
Implemented player movement and interaction systems.
Built the day/night cycle and object spawning systems.
Created the game settings and supporting UI.
challenge: Add the hardest technical challenge you faced and explain how you solved it.

title: DeliveryRush
description: Fast-paced 2D delivery game with package collection, deliveries, enemy obstacles and health management.
highlights: Designed the package collection and delivery loop.
Implemented enemy obstacles and player health management.
Created the 2D gameplay rules and moment-to-moment interactions.
Handled the project from initial design through implementation.
challenge: Add the hardest technical challenge you faced and explain how you solved it.

title: Personal Backend
description: Backend API powered by Node.js, PostgreSQL and Docker deployment.
highlights: Designed and implemented the backend API independently.
Created persistent data storage with PostgreSQL.
Containerized the application and database workflow with Docker.
Practiced deployment and backend service configuration.
challenge: Add the hardest technical challenge you faced and explain how you solved it.
